response: In Verona, feuding Montague and Capulet families’ heirs, Romeo and Juliet, fall madly in love after meeting by chance at a Capulet masquerade. Married secretly by Friar Laurence, their union unravels when a violent feud clash kills Romeo’s friend Mercutio, forcing Romeo into exile. To escape a forced marriage, Juliet fakes her death; misinformed, Romeo kills himself, the waking Juliet follows, their tragic deaths ending the families’ generations-long hatred.
